_description: Per-model prompting optimizations. Loaded by llm_route.py to auto-apply temperature overrides and system prompt wrapping.

opus.system_preamble: Use XML tags to structure your reasoning. Be thorough but avoid unnecessary hedging.

gpt-5.3-codex.system_preamble: Follow the CTCO framework: provide Context, then Task, then Constraints, then Output format. Be concrete with length constraints.

gpt-5.2.system_preamble: Follow the CTCO framework: provide Context, then Task, then Constraints, then Output format. Be concrete with length constraints.

gemini-3-pro.system_preamble: Be concise and direct. Avoid verbose analysis. Place critical constraints after context.

gemini-3-flash.system_preamble: Be concise and direct. Avoid verbose analysis.
